summary: P4 Features testing complete - Hardpoint fixes, clickable weapon/component cards, and Radar type addition. 12/14 backend tests passed (2 xfail for known wiki-injected ships bug). Frontend 100% pass - all weapons and components features working correctly.

minor.issue: Liberator and Merchantman (wiki-injected ships) have empty hardpoints - should have [5,5,4,4] and [7,7,5,5,4,4,4,4] respectively. The _inject_missing_wiki_ships function doesn't use _CURATED_HARDPOINTS from live_api.py

action_items: FIX: Update _inject_missing_wiki_ships() in /app/backend/routes/ships.py to include hardpoint data from _CURATED_HARDPOINTS in live_api.py for wiki-injected ships like Liberator and Merchantman
critical_code_review_comments: Wiki-injected ships (Liberator, Merchantman, etc.) don't receive hardpoint data because _inject_missing_wiki_ships() creates ship objects without checking _CURATED_HARDPOINTS
The hardpoint data exists in live_api.py _CURATED_HARDPOINTS dict but is only applied to ships from the live API via _normalize_vehicle()
Consider adding a helper to apply curated hardpoints to wiki-injected ships during injection

success_rate.backend: 86% (12/14 passed, 2 xfail for known wiki-ship hardpoint bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 features verified: 1) Components now include Radar type (32 radars out of 302 total). 2) Ship hardpoints fixed for Eclipse [9,9,9], Reclaimer [5,5], Talon Shrike [5,5] - but Liberator and Merchantman still have empty hardpoints (wiki-injected ships issue). 3) Weapon/Component cards are clickable with detail modals showing SCtools data including purchase locations and prices. 4) Best prices highlighted in green. All filters working on both pages.
